reason: The registered author-hosted COLM paper URL is historical evidence and its host does not expose a verified equivalent HTTPS document; retain the exact URL instead of inventing a replacement.
The official FIPA archive publishes this historical specification at an HTTP-only canonical path; the exception is exact and must be re-reviewed annually.
